name: Grade 6 Geography — Semester 2
description: An 18-week Grade 6 pathway for population, climate, development, sustainability, and evidence-based claims. Learning advances through inquiry, practice, authentic application, revision, and communication.
learningGoals: Develop grade 6 knowledge and transferable skills in population, climate, development, sustainability, and evidence-based claims.
Use appropriate evidence, vocabulary, tools, and methods to explain reasoning.
Plan, revise, collaborate responsibly, and communicate a well-supported conclusion.

lessons.title: Launch inquiry: population, climate, development, sustainability, and evidence-based claims
lessons.objective: I can develop a focused question and gather relevant evidence about population, climate, development, sustainability, and evidence-based claims and explain my reasoning with appropriate evidence.
